subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto her who soared upon the wings of certitude into the atmosphere of the All-Merciful until she recognized and believed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی التی طارت باجنحه الایقان الی هوآء الرحمن الی ان عرفت و آمنت
